summary: Completed comprehensive testing of responsive chatbot implementation. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Responsive layout functions correctly across all viewports. Critical frontend integration issue identified where chat messages don't display after sending.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat messages not appearing in chat area after sending - API calls succeed but messages don't render
Floating chat button not clickable due to overlay interception from Emergent badge

integration_issues.issue: Messages sent successfully to backend but not displayed in frontend chat interface

passed_tests: Desktop viewport layout (1920x800) - sidebar visible, content aligned
Mobile viewport layout (390x844) - sidebar hidden, hamburger menu functional
Input field interaction and message typing
Tab switching between Native and Iframe
Mock Santa Gadea data responses from backend
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical chat message display issue - messages are sent to backend successfully but not rendered in frontend chat interface. Also resolve ChatDock overlay click issue preventing floating chat button interaction.
